semantic_boundary.lawful_current_claim: WS10 root ceremony executed off-box under a reratified 3-of-3 root boundary only. Release, producer, CI, and verifier-acceptance roles remain planned. WS11 has not started.

topology_reratification.reason: Imported off-box evidence proves an executed 3-of-3 root ceremony and does not prove the earlier planned 3-of-5 topology.

invariants: Root material for WS10 PASS must be generated only on an off-box offline host.
Root quorum claims must match witnessed custody records and the reratified topology.
Verifier acceptance must remain on the predecessor bootstrap root until later workstreams explicitly widen it.
This policy proves only the reratified 3-of-3 root boundary, not the earlier planned 3-of-5 boundary.

steps.description: Stage blank hardware, printed checklist, sealed custody packets, and bootstrap trust references without generating any private material on a connected host.
Generate or rotate root shards on the isolated host and record witness identities plus hardware serials.
Verify root metadata offline before any export of public material.
Seal shard custody packets, storage locations, and emergency rotation activation instructions.

quorum_threshold_rules.claim_boundary: The executed WS10 boundary is reratified at 3-of-3 only.
Release signing remains planned and unexecuted.
Producer attestations remain planned and unexecuted.
CI identity binding remains planned and unexecuted.
Verifier acceptance remains planned and unexecuted.

root_shards: Store only on offline hardware or media used in the ceremony.
Require witness-backed custody records for every transferred shard.
Never copy private root material to connected development machines.
release_and_verifier_material: Keep release and verifier acceptance material offline when later minted.
Permit only public references and logical identifiers in connected planning artifacts.

required_actions: reissue root metadata and verifier acceptance bundle

verifier_acceptance_impact.current_boundary: No verifier acceptance widening is lawful from WS10 execution alone.

residual_limitations: Exact ceremony timestamps were not transcribed and remain UNKNOWN_AT_TRANSCRIPTION.
Root generation algorithm string was not transcribed beyond a high-level offline-generation statement.
Public root identifiers and fingerprints were not transcribed into the evidence packet.
Hardware serial or asset identifiers remain UNKNOWN_AT_TRANSCRIPTION.
